prompts.text: Close-up portrait of a woman in her 60s, soft window light, realistic skin texture with visible pores.
Full body photo of a dancer mid-leap on a city rooftop at golden hour, Canon EOS style.
Macro photo of dew on a spider web in a forest, shallow depth of field.
Two hands knitting yarn, detailed fingers and knuckles, warm indoor lighting.
A child's hand holding a small frog at a pond edge, photorealistic.
Hands preparing sushi on a bamboo mat, detailed rice grains and fingers.
Portrait of a middle-aged man laughing, crow's feet wrinkles, natural daylight.
Profile of a teenager with freckles and acne texture, studio softbox.
Elderly grandmother smiling, deep wrinkles, hazel eyes, indoors.
A red vintage delivery van with the text OPEN 7 DAYS painted on the side, city street.
Wooden sign reading WELCOME HOME with weathered paint, hanging on a cottage.
Neon sign COFFEE NOW reflected on wet pavement at night.
Interior of a cluttered workshop with tools, dust in sunbeams.
Aerial view of a marina with white boats, midday sun, polarized look.
Australian shepherd dog shaking off water, freeze motion, meadow background.
Stormy ocean waves crashing on black volcanic rocks, moody sky.
Glass of iced tea with condensation, lemon slices, outdoor picnic table.
Abandoned factory hall with graffiti, volumetric light shafts.
Flat vector travel poster for Kyoto, torii gate, minimal palette, print-ready.
Isometric low-poly miniature city with parks and roads, pastel colors.
App icon for a meditation app, gradient orb, modern iOS style.
Packaging mockup for organic tea, kraft paper texture, botanical illustration.
Chef flambeing mushrooms in a stainless pan, flames, restaurant kitchen.
Rain-soaked cobblestone alley in Porto, string lights, dusk.
Siberian husky with heterochromia, snow background, high detail fur.
Surgeon's gloved hands suturing, operating room bokeh background.
Piano player's hands on ivory keys, shallow DOF, concert hall.
Woman wearing traditional Indian jewelry, studio portrait, symmetric lighting.
Man with tattoos on neck, serious expression, monochrome dramatic light.
Child blowing dandelion seeds, backlit sunset, candid photo.
Billboard advertising SUMMER SALE 50% OFF against blue sky.
Rusty license plate reading GEMMA-404 on a desert road pickup truck.
Open book page with large heading PROLOGUE in serif type, paper texture.
Cyberpunk alley with holographic koi fish projections, rain reflections.
Steampunk compass on a leather journal, brass and copper details.
Alien desert with two moons, turquoise sand, sci-fi landscape.
UX wireframe illustration of a checkout flow, monochrome, annotations.
Seamless botanical pattern for textile, white peonies on navy background.
Mood board for Scandinavian living room, beige, oak, indoor plants.
Vintage typewriter on a wooden desk, cigarette smoke wisp, film grain.
Mountain biker jumping over a root on a forest trail, motion blur background.
Fresh sourdough loaf on linen cloth, flour dust, macro crust texture.
Barista pouring latte art heart, close-up of cup and wrists.
Two people arm-wrestling at a wooden tavern table, tension in tendons.
Actor in stage makeup, half face sad half happy, split lighting.
Hot air balloons over Cappadocia at sunrise, telephoto compression.
Underwater coral reef with a sea turtle, turquoise water, rays of light.
Minimalist concrete architecture with one lonely tree, brutalist style.
Logo mark for a bakery, wheat stalk + oven icon, black on white.
Still life of citrus fruits and a copper bowl, painterly but photorealistic.
